name: Glimmering Temptation
outcome: As [AttackerName] sighs erotically amid the raunchy lovemaking, a shimmering radiance suddenly dances across her frame in a surprise blinding flash, the mesmerizing spell imprinting cooing and rubbing phantasmal copies of herself onto [TargetName]'s already charmed senses, the harem-like illusions encouraging him to vapidly and frantically thrust into her squeezing [SexWord].
miss: As [AttackerName] sighs erotically while flaunting her body amid the raunchy lovemaking, a shimmering radiance suddenly dances across her frame in a surprise blinding flash, but [TargetName] manages to clench his eyes shut against the mesmerizing spell!
statusOutcome: With the illusory light not fading, [TargetName] keeps thrusting on autopilot, left haplessly stunned as a result of the complete lack of sight besides the glimmering fantasies of the succubus' phantasmal copies dancing through his vision.
